purpose: Honest inventory of existing data before building historical research infrastructure
principle: No fabricated, extrapolated, or backfilled data. Every finding annotated with source.

klines.format: wrapped {ts, code, klines: [{date, open, close, high, low, volume, turnover}]}

klinesShort.purpose: 30-day pipeline cache, 5-min TTL — not suitable for historical research

indices.source: Sina hq.sinajs.cn (daily close) for market_history; Eastmoney push2 (snapshot) for live

dataSources.name: Eastmoney datacenter-web V2 (RPT_DMSK_FN_MAININDICATOR)
dataSources.error: code 9501 — report config not found. API endpoint may have been deprecated.
dataSources.note: Previously used by _fetchStockDetailV2() in market_data.js. Currently fails on all requests.

dataSources.name: Eastmoney push2 V1 (push2.eastmoney.com)
dataSources.note: Provides current-snapshot financial data only — no historical announcement dates, no quarterly history. Used by _fetchStockDetailV1() for real-time display.

dataSources.name: Tencent ifzq K-line API
dataSources.note: Pre-reconciled (qfq) data. Turnover field is always 0. Volume is shares, not yuan.

financialAnnouncementDate.fallbackStrategy: REPORT_DATE + 120 days (legal maximum for annual reports in China)
financialAnnouncementDate.fallbackRisk: Conservative — data becomes visible later than actual, safe from lookahead but may miss valid financial info
financialAnnouncementDate.recommendation: Proceed with REPORT_DATE + 120-day fallback for initial historical snapshots. Flag all financial data as _announcementDateEstimated: true.

sectorClassification.eastmoneyIndustryField: f100 (industry code) from push2 V1 — only current, no historical industry changes
sectorClassification.recommendation: Record industry code from snapshot-date push2 data if available. Sector classification will be missing for most historical dates.

risks: IP rate limiting by Tencent on non-cloud connections
Some stocks listed after 2020 will have shorter history
STAR market (688xxx) stocks only exist from 2019+
downloadFeasibility.recommendation: Run download_klines.js on cloud server (8.153.101.112) to leverage its unfiltered internet access

actionItems.detail: Financial announcement dates are not available from any API. Use REPORT_DATE + 120-day estimation. Tag all financial fields with _estimated: true until a reliable source is found.
Build a code-to-industry mapping from Eastmoney f100 field. Snapshot industry for each historical date if API provides it point-in-time.
